name: Diadys
description:
A male harpy has captured you and brought you to his nest. 
In this game, will you be able to make him fall in love with you, or will you die? 
--------

The idea of making a harpy was given to me by another person! Meanwhile the Otome system from @alylysiren (chub) was interesting, so I've made a similar one for my monster-like creatures that also works with NovelAi. 

**The system was tested with OpenAi GPT and NovelAI!**
creator: RavenSama
